headline: Why Investors Are Finally Separating Quantum Computing Winners From Losers
summary: For much of the past two years, investors treated quantum computing as a single investment theme. headline: Here’s a first look at Slate auto’s $25,000 modular cars
summary: Affordable electric vehicle startup Slate Auto just unveiled its modular $25,000 pickup truck. The low price relative to other vehicles on the market comes in part from the truck's basic features, like crank windows and no screens. The vehicles can also be ordered as SUVs and buyers can customize colors, stitching and other designs. CNBC’s Michael Wayland takes a first look.
